query: Count all buildings in Kristiansand municipality that intersect 200-year storm-surge areas.

1.description: Fetch Kristiansand municipality boundary to filter storm-surge areas and buildings

2.description: Fetch 200-year storm-surge areas for spatial filtering

3.description: Clip storm-surge areas to Kristiansand municipality boundary

4.description: Fetch all buildings in Kristiansand municipality

5.description: Identify buildings intersecting clipped storm-surge areas

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson, kommunenummer, kommunenavn FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM stormflohavniva_03618ac2d6ba4ba0ae13e7ead6caf572.stormflo200ar_klimaarna;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join
-- left_source: 1
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom_geojson"
-- right_geom: "geom_geojson"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(representasjonspunkt, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 4
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom_geojson"
-- right_geom: "geom_geojson"
